final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: product-mockup
Asset type: professional culinary photography, commercial food shot
Primary request: macro close-up of a plated French Michelin three-star main course — slow-cooked duck breast with truffle sauce
Scene/backdrop: dark marble countertop, minimalist fine-dining setting with shallow depth of field
Subject: sliced duck breast with golden-brown crispy skin and pink juicy interior, arranged in precise overlapping pattern
Style/medium: professional food photography, editorial commercial style, photorealistic
Composition/framing: macro close-up, shallow depth of field, precise focus on duck breast cross-section texture, side lighting
Lighting/mood: dramatic side lighting creating highlights on crispy skin and sauce gloss, luxurious fine-dining atmosphere
Color palette: rich golden-brown duck skin, deep pink meat tones, dark marble blacks, white bone china, vibrant micro-vegetable accents
Materials/textures: crispy caramelized duck skin with visible texture, glossy truffle sauce smears, delicate micro-greens, fresh black truffle slices
Constraints: keep duck breast cross-section as focal point with sharp detail, maintain luxurious restaurant ambiance
Avoid: overcooked gray meat, plastic-looking food, flat lighting, watermark, oversaturated unnatural colors
